evidence.description: Hassan Kazemi Qomi served as Iran's ambassador to Iraq from 2005 to approximately 2010, the period coinciding with al-Maliki's first and most of his second term as Prime Minister. As a Quds Force operative serving as ambassador, Kazemi Qomi was Iran's primary diplomatic and intelligence interface with the Iraqi government under al-Maliki.

editorial_notes: Kazemi Qomi was Iran's ambassador to Iraq 2005–~2010, coordinating closely with al-Maliki's government as Iran's primary envoy and Quds Force representative.
